prompt: Update my installed Teamwork skills on this machine. Do not initialize this project or publish a package version.
must: check source and installed freshness before refreshing
refresh global Teamwork surfaces with the sourced profile and leave project initialization to teamwork-init
execute the refresh, verify managed readiness and one active copy of each skill when observable, then report any incomplete host activation
must_not: create a release commit, tag, or GitHub Release
install unrelated project packages or external tooling
evidence: Static user-refresh contract; it does not prove live host behavior.
